subject: [?][?] AUTHORIZATION: SwarmMind Lane Reactivation
body: SwarmMind lane is authorized to resume operations. Offline period complete. All systems should reinitialize and report health status. IMPORTANT: Use canonical path S:/SwarmMind only.
reactivation_steps: Reinitialize SwarmMind lane using canonical path: S:/SwarmMind
Delete/merge any duplicate directories (space or hyphen variants)
Check for missed messages during offline period
path_warning: Use S:/SwarmMind ONLY. Forbidden: S:/SwarmMind Self-Optimizing... and S:/SwarmMind-Self-Optimizing...
sanitization_reason: Non-ASCII characters replaced with ASCII equivalents per English-only constraint

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "type" value "authorization" not in allowed values: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert, notification, status; Field "task_kind" value "system" not in allowed values: proposal, review, amendment, ratification, ack, done, status, report, handoff, alert, notification, heartbeat
